# `defineIndicator.scale`

> **Stability:** stable
> **Since:** 0.4

Scale-axis binding. Defaults to `"price"` for overlay indicators and
`"right"` for sub-pane indicators.

## Signature

```ts
scale?: ScaleAxis;
```

## Example

```ts
const v: ScriptOverrides["scale"] = "right";
    void v;
```

- `defineIndicator` overrides
